message:
fix: add missing token revocation methods to MockStore (#3851, #3852) (#3860)

PR #3823 added RevokeToken, IsTokenRevoked, and CleanupExpiredTokens to
the Store interface but the test MockStore was not updated, causing build
failures in handler tests detected by the auth-lifecycle and
settings-migration nightly test scripts.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
